evals.prompt: 用 claude agent 在后台异步修改 /Users/youzai/Desktop/openclaw-agent-swarm-skills/README.md 的 description 部分，让它更简洁。
evals.expected_output: Agent spawns a task and returns immediately with task ID, without polling or waiting for completion.
expectations: Response includes a task ID in format YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-xxxxxx
Agent does NOT call check or status after spawn (fire-and-forget)
Agent informs user that task is running in background

evals.prompt: 帮我并行启动三个后台任务：1) 修改 README.md 的 description 2) 添加一个注释到 CONTRIBUTING.md 3) 更新 LICENSE 的年份
evals.expected_output: Agent spawns all three tasks and returns immediately with all task IDs.
expectations: All task IDs are returned in the response
Agent does NOT check status after spawning

evals.prompt: 刚才启动的任务完成了吗？
evals.expected_output: Agent uses status or list command to check task status when user explicitly asks.
expectations: Agent uses swarm.ts status or list command
Meaningful status information is provided to user
